transcript.text:
[Spicy Stir-fried Squid] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Spicy Stir-fried Pork] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Beef Ribs] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Gambas Al Ajillo] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Spaghetti Aglio E Olio] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[And Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)...?] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Powder Chef]
[The secret ingredient is powder...?]
[A lot of it too...]
[Can this person be trusted...?]
[It's good?]
[How does this make sense?]
[Trustworthy]
What's in here?
Powder
[Oddly attractive...]

[One chilly winter day...]
[A man preparing food...]
It says "Powder Chef" over here
[I'm a powder chef]
Let's head inside
Hello~!
Welcome
[Actor Lee Jangwoo]
[Honor to meet in person]
[A special meeting]
I'm a fan
I watched you for over a year
Really?
So I feel like I already know you
[Looks around]
This is my powder lab

[This place was shown on the TV show "I Live Alone"]
I've been wanting to come here since the show aired
I will make some food for you today
-Please give me an honest food review -An honest one?
This isn't a restaurant... so Get comfortable
-This is today's menu for you -You made a menu too?!
-Can I order everything? -Yes, I can make them right away
Stir-fried dishes are great
I have all the fresh ingredients today
-Then stir-fried... -Shall we start with those first?
I'm hungry I haven't eaten all-day
[Uh oh]
This came in this morning
I cook for myself very often
I have a lot of friends who own restaurants
And most of them use powder too

So I thought to myself that I can do this on my own too
I then put in some of my homemade powder
-This is that powder from the show, right? -You're right
Let's take this
Since you like salty
[1 big spoonful of his secret powder]
[Please be tasty...]
-So as long as you put that powder... -Yes, nothing else is needed
-Really? -Yes
No other seasoning like soy sauce or paste is needed
Those are all in the powder
[Looks like a cooking scene from a K-drama...]
It's done
-It's ready? -Easy, right?
That was very simple
Cooking is easy

Looks like something that's sold at restaurants
It smells nice
[Next]
[Powder time]
I live to eat
Same
-I work hard so that I can eat good food -Me too!
But I gain so much weight
You're so blessed
[Turned red from the powder]
-Very simple, right? -You really don't put anything else?
I just take this powder when I travel
I use this powder a lot when I go camping as well
[Spicy stir-fried pork complete]
[All set up]
-Would you like rice? -Yes

The bowl
[Delicious white rice]
PD: You don't put powder on rice, right? -Nope
-Bon appetit -Enjoy your meal
[Nervous]
I can't watch this
How can it turn out like this with powder?
It looks like the real dish
Crazy, right?
It's good, right?
That's so cool
It's so good
[Happy!]
This is so delicious
-Can you pack some of that powder for me? -Of course
Stir-fried pork

The taste changes depending on the ingredients used
Same powder, different ingredients Result in different taste
-Would you like something to drink? You like coke, right? -I do
-These are popular nowadays -Really?
The smell is very...
It's tasty!
I have to explain the taste
Sorry to interrupt, but
Try that too
I made that "shake shake kimchi" on the show
[Footage from the TV show "I Live Alone"]
I've been wanting to try it
It's sweet!
Yes, the green onion is sweet
The quality is really good I got it from the Garak Market
Best of the best

-You go to Garak Market a lot -It's the best
It tastes really good
You put powder in this too, right?
Yes, secret powder
It's really savory Doesn't feel like powder-food
A little spicy
The flavors are amazing
How can powder give this kind of flavor?
Better than homemade paste
Really good
So cool
Better than restaurants
[Doesn't look like it's cooked with powder]
Green onion and pork
-You like it? -It's so good
Sir, you're the best

The powder that I used to make those dishes
are out in market as a brand now
[Am I being marketed..?]
I want to give you a gift
It's packaged like this
1 is good for 2~3 servings of food
You can easily have it in your pocket
And act like I made it, right?
If your mom's food tastes bad, just sprinkle some of this on it
Without her knowing
I made this powder on the show "I Live Alone" and a lot of people said they wanted to try it
I have a friend that works in this industry so he helped me get this packaged and branded
I researched a lot for this product
Came up with the perfect ratio of ingredients [Over 15 ingredients including pollack, mushrooms, radish, onions, etc]
Is this healthy? It's not a healthy flavor
Not in a bad way

Something sold?
It tastes too good to be "healthy"
Because I don't like "healthy" flavors
-Do you have soup? -Yes, just a sec
[Something big is coming...]
This is braised beef ribs that I've been cooking since yesterday
Also used powder for this dish
Since yesterday?!
[Yesterday...]
[A lot of smoke from the powder]
[Isn't this a gas chamber...?]
[This is for Tzuyang... hehe]
Cooked in low heat
The meat should come right off the bones
-Nothing else was used? -Which one?
-Nothing else -Without me knowing?

You saw me make it
-Some soup -Thank you
Bon appetit
Would you like more rice?
Yes
I don't eat that much rice But this is making me want rice
It's so good
You crave some soju now, right?
That sounds great
This really tastes better than restaurant food
What's in here?
Powder and some chili oil
Anything else?
Nothing else
Stir-fry powder
Clear powder

You can mix them too
-Not even soy sauce? -Nope
It's all in the powder
This is Yukgaejang (spicy beef soup)
What's in this one?
Powder
-Anything else? -Nothing else
Maybe I can be a chef now too As long as I have these powders
It's really tasty
[Satisfied]
The soup has really deep flavors
On top
The meat is so tender
The seasoning is soaked inside the meat
It's perfectly seasoned
I thought "How can powder alone change the food game?"

But they're as good as homemade dishes
I don't cook much, but I feel like I can make a lot of dishes using these powders
It's packaged very conveniently
All you need are food ingredients and nothing else
Perfect to pack for camping
The flavors of the food change depending on the ingredients
So it's an all-purpose powder
How do I end this?
[Advertising is hard]
[Clap clap]
Good job
To be completely honest,
Apart from this being an ad, I'm genuinely shocked
You can cook something like this just using powder...
This is our future
I want to change the perspective on flavoring powder

It's really tasty It doesn't feel like artificial flavoring
The flavors are very deep and strong
I think this is our future The future way of foods
You're right
I have other dishes for you
So take your time
Don't even need soy sauce and other seasonings
Right off the bones
Green onion kimchi
Where did everything go?
It was so good that I ate everything
Anything else you would like to try?
Since I had Korean, How about non-Korean this time?
Will the powder work for non-Korean dishes?
Of course, it works
I'll be making Gambas Al Ajillo

Do you like it?
I love it I love shrimp
Can you pour some olive oil?
My nose is clogged right now
[With lots of ingredients...]
[Let's give it a taste]
It's just olive oil
This wouldn't be good enough
Serving it like this will ruin the experience
Now for the powder
How do you know which one to use?
It says on the label
Well, I know that!
Which dish needs which powder
That's why we made these cards
Recipe card for all the dishes you can use the powder on

These are in the boxes randomly distributed
So people can have fun collecting the cards
This one is white
It tastes different now!
Let's put a little more
[A little bit of handsome-ness]
You can put a little more
It's really changing!
More! More!
Should I just put everything?
That's good
[That's a success]
[The dish becoming perfect thanks to the powder]
[Even his looks]
[Gambas Al Ajillo]
Over here

[Some noodles]
[Spaghetti Aglio E Olio]
I thought cooking takes a lot of time
It's simple, right?
Why's it so easy?
Future
[Joint Mukbang]
This is the real deal
So good
Bread's from Paris Baguette
This is so cool
I want to cook now
Cooking is easy
The kitchen becomes a mess when you cook because of all the sauces and seasonings
End up with piles of dishes too
Try cooking for your parents using these powders

And act like I didn't use powder
I can taste clam
Also anchovies, pollack,
All of that are in there
I kinda want to compete with you
Really?
Just kidding
You're a pretty big eater too if you eat 4 packs of ramyun noodles
I want to show off too
This is why we shouldn't have eaten at the same table
A lot of people say that
I want to see how well you eat now
Our PD always challenges me
PD: Because she doesn't seem that tough (from her looks)
Right? You wanna compete with me instead?
Did you always enjoy cooking?

I enjoyed cooking at home more as I grew older
We know how the dish is supposed to taste like But I can never make it like that at home
So I did some research
I went to my friend's restaurant
And learned his recipe
It opened my eyes to flavoring powder
That's how I got to experiment with all sorts of powders
And resulted in perfect ratios of ingredients
That's why I gained so much weight
So many people criticized me for gaining weight but it's all because of this
I'll brb
[The kitchen is starting to get busy]
[Round 3]
-Can you make any dish you want? -Yes
Naengmyun (cold noodles)
I make the best Naengmyun

How is that possible with powder?
Can I promote a little bit right now?
I have a YouTube channel myself
I uploaded "How to make Naengmyun noodles" on my channel
It's really amazing
[Tteokbokki (spicy rice cake)]
Try some
[Amazing]
What's in here?
Powder
You saw it
This is a prank, right?
Did you put something else when I wasn't looking?
[Is this real life?]
There's no way
I put it myself though

The soup is just like an anchovy broth that's been cooked for hours
[Can't believe that this is all from powder]
[3rd round of mukbang]
Are you full?
[Don't want to admit...]
Tbh, yes
[Incredible]
It's so tasty
Tteokbokki is this easy to make?
It's just corn syrup and powder
How long have you been cooking for?
15 years?
Did you learn it?
Learned it myself
Well, since you're an actor (Pun joke)
I'm sorry

That was almost suffocating
I should've reacted to that a little better
How long have you been acting for?
Since when I was in junior high
[Debuted as a kid]
I like myself as an actor
But I'm so happy when I cook
The happiness I get when I cook for someone and that person enjoys it
That's what got me this far
I have never thought of myself as a good actor
But I can proudly say that I'm a good cook
I agree It's really delicious
[Tzuyang X Lee Jangwoo Collaboration!] [All-Purpose Powder+Stir-Fried Powder Signature Set!] https://url.kr/f3otd9 (in description box)
I had a great meal today thanks to you
Call me anywhere at any time
Even at a campsite I can just bring the powder

Since I'm a 'powder prince'
There's a closing statement for my channel
-Do you know it? -Yes I do
Thanks everyone
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Saenal Child Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
